name: Revolution Co., Ltd.
summary: Revolution Co., Ltd. engages in real estate rental management business in Japan. It is involved in the arrangement, management, and repair of rental properties; weekly/monthly rental, real estate brokerage, and ready-built and renovation businesses; and playback sales of used equipment. The company was formerly known as Harakosan Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Revolution Co., Ltd. in November 2019. Revolution Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Shimonoseki, Japan.
